signaling.c(3) Library Functions Manual signaling.c(3)

NAME

signaling.c

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct find_client_context_t
Context for finding client by participant_id. struct broadcast_context_t
Context for broadcasting to session participants.

Functions


asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_sdp (sqlite3 *db, tcp_server_t *tcp_server, const acip_webrtc_sdp_t *sdp, size_t total_packet_len)
Relay SDP offer/answer to recipient. asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_ice (sqlite3 *db, tcp_server_t *tcp_server, const acip_webrtc_ice_t *ice, size_t total_packet_len)
Relay ICE candidate to recipient. asciichat_error_t signaling_broadcast (sqlite3 *db, tcp_server_t *tcp_server, const uint8_t session_id[16], packet_type_t packet_type, const void *packet, size_t packet_len, const uint8_t *exclude_participant_id)
Broadcast packet to all session participants.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t signaling_broadcast (sqlite3 * db, tcp_server_t * tcp_server, const uint8_t session_id[16], packet_type_t packet_type, const void * packet, size_t packet_len, const uint8_t * exclude_participant_id)

Broadcast packet to all session participants. Sends packet to all participants in a session (optionally excluding one). Used internally by SDP/ICE relay when recipient_id is all zeros.

Parameters

db SQLite database handle (for session validation)
tcp_server TCP server with client registry
session_id Session UUID
packet_type Packet type to send
packet Packet data to broadcast
packet_len Packet length
exclude_participant_id Participant to exclude (NULL = no exclusion, typically sender)

Returns

ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise

Definition at line 223 of file signaling.c.

225                                                                              {
226   if (!db || !tcp_server || !session_id || !packet) {
227     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "db, tcp_server, session_id, or packet is NULL");
228   }
229 
230   /* Find session by UUID using database lookup */
231   session_entry_t *session = database_session_find_by_id(db, session_id);
232   if (!session) {
233     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Session not found for broadcast");
234   }
235   session_entry_destroy(session); // We only need to validate existence
236 
237   // Broadcast to all participants in session (excluding sender if specified)
238   broadcast_context_t ctx = {.target_session_id = session_id,
239                              .exclude_participant_id = exclude_participant_id,
240                              .packet_type = packet_type,
241                              .packet = packet,
242                              .packet_len = packet_len,
243                              .sent_count = 0};
244 
245   tcp_server_foreach_client(tcp_server, broadcast_callback, &ctx);
246 
247   if (ctx.sent_count == 0) {
248     log_warn("Broadcast sent to 0 participants (all offline or not joined yet)");
249   } else {
250     log_debug("Broadcast sent to %zu participants", ctx.sent_count);
251   }
252 
253   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
254 }




References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    database_session_find_by_id(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, log_debug, log_warn,
    broadcast_context_t::sent_count, session_entry_destroy(),
    session_id, SET_ERRNO, and
  tcp_server_foreach_client().


Referenced by signaling_relay_ice(), and
    signaling_relay_sdp().






asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_ice (sqlite3 * db,
  tcp_server_t * tcp_server, const acip_webrtc_ice_t * ice, size_t
  total_packet_len)


Relay ICE candidate to recipient. Relays ICE packet to specific
    participant or broadcasts to all participants in the session if recipient_id
    is all zeros.




Parameters


db SQLite database handle (for session validation)


tcp_server TCP server with client registry


ice ICE packet to relay (with variable-length candidate data following
  struct)


total_packet_len Total packet length including variable data


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 181 of file signaling.c.


182                                                                {
183   if (!db || !tcp_server || !ice) {
184     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "db, tcp_server, or ice is NULL");
185   }
186 
187   /* Find session by UUID using database lookup */
188   session_entry_t *session = database_session_find_by_id(db, ice->session_id);
189   if (!session) {
190     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Session not found for ICE relay");
191   }
192   session_entry_destroy(session); // We only need to validate existence
193 
194   // Check if broadcast (recipient_id all zeros) or unicast
195   if (is_broadcast_uuid(ice->recipient_id)) {
196     // Broadcast to all participants in session (except sender)
197     log_debug("Broadcasting ICE candidate to all participants in session (excluding sender)");
198     return signaling_broadcast(db, tcp_server, ice->session_id, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_ICE, ice, total_packet_len,
199                                ice->sender_id);
200   } else {
201     // Unicast to specific recipient
202     find_client_context_t ctx = {
203         .target_participant_id = ice->recipient_id, .found_socket = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE, .found = false};
204 
205     tcp_server_foreach_client(tcp_server, find_participant_callback, &ctx);
206 
207     if (!ctx.found) {
208       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Recipient participant not found (may be offline)");
209     }
210 
211     // Send ICE packet to recipient
212     int result = send_packet(ctx.found_socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_ICE, ice, total_packet_len);
213     if (result != 0) {
214       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to send ICE packet to recipient");
215     }
216 
217     log_debug("Relayed ICE candidate from sender to recipient (socket=%d)", ctx.found_socket);
218   }
219 
220   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
221 }






References acip_webrtc_ice_t, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    database_session_find_by_id(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NETWORK, ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL,
    find_client_context_t::found,
    find_client_context_t::found_socket, INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE,
    log_debug, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_ICE, send_packet(),
    session_entry_destroy(), SET_ERRNO,
    signaling_broadcast(), and tcp_server_foreach_client().






asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_sdp (sqlite3 * db,
  tcp_server_t * tcp_server, const acip_webrtc_sdp_t * sdp, size_t
  total_packet_len)


Relay SDP offer/answer to recipient. Relays SDP packet to specific
    participant or broadcasts to all participants in the session if recipient_id
    is all zeros.




Parameters


db SQLite database handle (for session validation)


tcp_server TCP server with client registry


sdp SDP packet to relay (with variable-length SDP data following struct)


total_packet_len Total packet length including variable data


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 134 of file signaling.c.


135                                                                {
136   if (!db || !tcp_server || !sdp) {
137     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "db, tcp_server, or sdp is NULL");
138   }
139 
140   /* Find session by UUID using database lookup */
141   log_debug("SDP relay: Looking up session_id=%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x",
142             sdp->session_id[0], sdp->session_id[1], sdp->session_id[2], sdp->session_id[3], sdp->session_id[4],
143             sdp->session_id[5], sdp->session_id[6], sdp->session_id[7], sdp->session_id[8], sdp->session_id[9],
144             sdp->session_id[10], sdp->session_id[11], sdp->session_id[12], sdp->session_id[13], sdp->session_id[14],
145             sdp->session_id[15]);
146   session_entry_t *session = database_session_find_by_id(db, sdp->session_id);
147   if (!session) {
148     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Session not found for SDP relay");
149   }
150   session_entry_destroy(session); // We only need to validate existence
151 
152   // Check if broadcast (recipient_id all zeros) or unicast
153   if (is_broadcast_uuid(sdp->recipient_id)) {
154     // Broadcast to all participants in session (except sender)
155     log_debug("Broadcasting SDP to all participants in session (excluding sender)");
156     return signaling_broadcast(db, tcp_server, sdp->session_id, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_SDP, sdp, total_packet_len,
157                                sdp->sender_id);
158   } else {
159     // Unicast to specific recipient
160     find_client_context_t ctx = {
161         .target_participant_id = sdp->recipient_id, .found_socket = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE, .found = false};
162 
163     tcp_server_foreach_client(tcp_server, find_participant_callback, &ctx);
164 
165     if (!ctx.found) {
166       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Recipient participant not found (may be offline)");
167     }
168 
169     // Send SDP packet to recipient
170     int result = send_packet(ctx.found_socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_SDP, sdp, total_packet_len);
171     if (result != 0) {
172       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to send SDP packet to recipient");
173     }
174 
175     log_debug("Relayed SDP from sender to recipient (socket=%d)", ctx.found_socket);
176   }
177 
178   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
179 }






References acip_webrtc_sdp_t, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    database_session_find_by_id(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NETWORK, ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL,
    find_client_context_t::found,
    find_client_context_t::found_socket, INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE,
    log_debug, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_SDP, send_packet(),
    session_entry_destroy(), SET_ERRNO,
    signaling_broadcast(), and tcp_server_foreach_client().
